top.name: Storm Lord
top.rules_text: Imbue all tiles within range 2 of you with Storm. Each Storm tile strikes the nearest enemy for 1 damage at end of each turn. Lasts 3 turns.

channel.name: Storm Lord (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Storm tiles also slow enemies crossing them

bottom.name: Caldera
bottom.rules_text: Create a ring of Fire tiles at range 2 from target point. Enemies inside the ring take 4 damage and are trapped (must cross Fire to escape).

channel.name: Caldera (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Fire ring also deals 4 damage to enemies crossing it
